method.description: Threat Intelligence Engine v1.0 event clustering with ontology subtype classification.
rules: merge items with high title similarity
merge moderately similar items when actor/category/country context overlaps
calculate primary country using weighted title, summary, URL, location and related item signals
calculate confidence score using source count, source diversity and official-source bonus
classify event_type as operational or background
classify event_subtype as incident, activity, indicator or assessment

threat_ontology.activity: military, political or security activity that shapes risk

events.title: Baltic states 'strongly reject' Russian lies in Moscow
events.summary: Diplomats from the Baltic states on Friday strongly rejected disinformation efforts of the Russian Foreign Ministry in Moscow.
related_titles: Baltic states 'strongly reject' Russian lies in Moscow

events.title: New U-Boot flaws could enable stealthy firmware attacks
events.summary: Six vulnerabilities in the widely used U-Boot bootloader have been discovered that could allow attackers to execute malicious code during device boot, potentially enabling stealthy firmware attacks that compromise security protections and install persistent malware. [...]
related_titles: New U-Boot flaws could enable stealthy firmware attacks

events.title: Europe revives law allowing big tech to scan for CSAM
events.summary: The law known as Chat Control 2.0 passed in the European Parliament, permitting companies like Google, Meta and Microsoft to scan users' messages to hunt for CSAM.
related_titles: Europe revives law allowing big tech to scan for CSAM

events.title: Ryuk ransomware member pleads guilty in the US, faces 15 years in prison
events.summary: A 34-year-old Armenian man has pleaded guilty to hacking U.S. companies and deploying the infamous Ryuk ransomware to encrypt their systems. [...]
related_titles: Ryuk ransomware member pleads guilty in the US, faces 15 years in prison

events.title: Ryuk operator pleads guilty; Blackcat/AlphV conspirator gets nearly 6-year sentence
events.summary: One man accused of deploying Ryuk ransomware pleaded guilty Wednesday in an Oregon federal court to conspiracy and computer fraud, while another man received a 70-month federal prison sentence in a Florida court for helping the Blackcat/AlphV gang extort multiple victims.
related_titles: Ryuk operator pleads guilty; Blackcat/AlphV conspirator gets nearly 6-year sentence

events.title: Police suspects Dutch hackers were involved in Odido breach
events.summary: The Dutch National Police (Politie) says it has found "strong indications" that Dutch hackers have been involved in a February breach at the telecommunications provider Odido. [...]
related_titles: Police suspects Dutch hackers were involved in Odido breach

events.title: Hackers exploit critical auth bypass in Gitea Docker image
events.summary: Hackers are actively exploiting a critical vulnerability in the official Docker image for the Gitea self-hosted Git service that allows attackers to impersonate any user, including administrators. [...]
related_titles: Hackers exploit critical auth bypass in Gitea Docker image

events.title: The Replicant in Your Directory: AI Agents and the Identity Security Gap
events.summary: AI agents are accelerating the growth of non-human identities, making it harder for organizations to understand what exists, who owns it, and what it can access. Netwrix explains why stronger visibility and identity governance are essential as AI expands the enterprise attack surface. [...]
related_titles: The Replicant in Your Directory: AI Agents and the Identity Security Gap

events.title: Latvia's foreign trade figures were on the up in May
events.summary: Central Statistical Bureau provisional data show that in May 2026 Latvia had foreign trade turnover of 3.86 billion euro, and at current prices it was 8.4 % higher than a year ago.
related_titles: Latvia's foreign trade figures were on the up in May

events.title: China, India ran separate spying campaigns against same Pakistani police force
events.summary: The activity, in some cases breaching the exact same systems, ran between February 2024 and April 2026 and centered on the force responsible for the country’s southwestern province that has been the site of a long-running separatist insurgency.
related_titles: China, India ran separate spying campaigns against same Pakistani police force

events.title: Estonian farmers have been hit hard by rising fertilizer prices
events.summary: Farmers are in a difficult situation because fertilizer prices have surged due to the Middle East crisis. The European Union plans to use €540 million from the agricultural crisis reserve to support farmers. Estonia, however, believes that the distribution of funds leaves local producers at a disadvantage.
related_titles: Estonian farmers have been hit hard by rising fertilizer prices

events.title: Defense Intelligence: Russia may face air force fuel problems after Ukrainian strikes
events.summary: The Omsk oil refinery, which in previous years produced about 15 percent of the jet fuel Russia needs, has halted operations, said Colonel Ants Kiviselg, head of the Estonian Defense Intelligence Center.
related_titles: Defense Intelligence: Russia may face air force fuel problems after Ukrainian strikes

events.title: Former ransomware negotiator gets 4 years for BlackCat attacks
events.summary: A former employee of cybersecurity incident response company DigitalMint was sentenced to 70 months in prison for targeting U.S. companies in BlackCat (ALPHV) ransomware attacks. [...]
related_titles: Former ransomware negotiator gets 4 years for BlackCat attacks

events.title: Lithuanian arrested in big cigarette seizure in Rīga
events.summary: Tax and Customs Police officers, in cooperation with State Border Guard officers, conducted an inspection of a warehouse in Rīga, in the Teika suburb, at the end of June this year. During the search, a large quantity of cigarettes, vehicles, tracking devices and other items were seized, indicating an intention to covertly transport a large quantity of cigarettes of illegal origin.
related_titles: Lithuanian arrested in big cigarette seizure in Rīga

events.title: 'Lion's Leap' military exercises taking place this weekend
events.summary: From July 11 to 12, the international military exercise “Lions Leap” will be held in the vicinity of Ozolaine, Vecsaule parish, Bauska district, in which the 53rd Infantry Battalion of the 1st Riga Brigade of the National Guard, the 503rd Infantry Company of the Lithuanian National Guard, and soldiers of the 2025 draft of the State Defense Service will participate.
related_titles: 'Lion's Leap' military exercises taking place this weekend

events.title: Peeter Kaldre: The time of Europe began in Ankara
events.summary: The NATO summit in Ankara may go down in history for the decision that Europe will ultimately take over the alliance's future leadership role from the United States, Peeter Kaldre writes.
related_titles: Peeter Kaldre: The time of Europe began in Ankara

events.title: NATO Ankara summit gift leaves Estonian prime minister with revolver dilemma
events.summary: Prime Minister Kristen Michal (Reform) came from this week's NATO summit in Ankara bearing an unusual gift — a revolver which he has had to leave behind in Turkey, Delfi reported.
related_titles: NATO Ankara summit gift leaves Estonian prime minister with revolver dilemma

events.title: Raul Aron: The most important issue has been forgotten in the tax debate
events.summary: The goal of the tax debate should not be to raise taxes until Estonia reaches the European average tax burden, but to ensure a tax system that is as competitive as possible in financing public services, Raul Aron writes. This brings more money into the country and increases tax revenue.
related_titles: Raul Aron: The most important issue has been forgotten in the tax debate

events.title: Latvia is Belarus' first target for hybrid war: Border Guard chief
events.summary: Latvia is currently the number one target of Belarus’s hybrid warfare, and the challenges are immense, Guntis Pujāts, commander of the State Border Guard, told Latvian Television on July 9 regarding the situation on the eastern border.
related_titles: Latvia is Belarus' first target for hybrid war: Border Guard chief

events.title: Chancellor: Requiring resident permit applicants to submit bank statements unlawful
events.summary: Chancellor of Justice Ülle Madise says it is unlawful for the Police and Border Guard Board (PPA) to require residence permit applicants to submit bank account statements covering the previous two years.
related_titles: Chancellor: Requiring resident permit applicants to submit bank statements unlawful

events.title: Artificial intelligence used in Estonian shops' video surveillance systems
events.summary: In some stores across Estonia, security camera footage is also monitored by artificial intelligence, which analyzes shoppers' behavior patterns. However, the technology is not yet widely used.
related_titles: Artificial intelligence used in Estonian shops' video surveillance systems

events.title: Dutch police trace Odido telco cyberattack to suspected local accomplice
events.summary: Dutch police said Thursday they had uncovered evidence suggesting that Dutch criminals were involved in the cyberattack on telecom provider Odido that exposed the personal data of more than 6 million customers earlier this year.
related_titles: Dutch police trace Odido telco cyberattack to suspected local accomplice

events.title: OpenMandriva Linux says contributor tried to sabotage the project
events.summary: The OpenMandriva Linux project announced that it was the target of an attempted act of internal sabotage after a dispute among contributors. [...]
related_titles: OpenMandriva Linux says contributor tried to sabotage the project

events.title: Injective SDK on npm infected with cryptocurrency wallet stealer
events.summary: Hackers compromised the Injective Labs SDK project's GitHub repository and used it to publish a malicious package on the Node Package Manager (npm) that stole cryptocurrency wallet private keys and mnemonic seed phrases. [...]
related_titles: Injective SDK on npm infected with cryptocurrency wallet stealer

events.title: New Helix vishing group emerges in SharePoint data theft attacks
events.summary: A new data-extortion group called Helix is using identity-focused tactics such as voice phishing (vishing), device code phishing, and multi-factor authentication (MFA) abuse to steal data from SharePoint environments. [...]
related_titles: New Helix vishing group emerges in SharePoint data theft attacks

events.title: New Forg365 phishing platform uses AI to target Microsoft 365 accounts
events.summary: A new phishing-as-a-service (PhaaS) operation called Forg365 focuses on stealing Microsoft 365 accounts by combining adversary-in-the-middle (AiTM) and device code methods with AI-assisted lure generation. [...]
related_titles: New Forg365 phishing platform uses AI to target Microsoft 365 accounts

events.title: EU opens infringement case against Estonia over work‑conditions directive
events.summary: The European Commission has opened an infringement procedure against Estonia over the directive on transparent working conditions. The Ministry of Economic Affairs says the issue concerns technical matters that have already been resolved.
related_titles: EU opens infringement case against Estonia over work‑conditions directive

events.title: Estonian government approves extending temporary protection of Ukrainian refugees
events.summary: The government on Thursday approved Estonia's position on a draft implementing decision of the Council of the European Union that would extend temporary protection for Ukrainian war refugees through 2028.
related_titles: Estonian government approves extending temporary protection of Ukrainian refugees

events.title: Estonia seeks EU funding ban for IOC over Russia decision
events.summary: Estonia has called for the International Olympic Committee (IOC) to be barred from receiving European Union funding over its stance on Russia competing in top level sport.
related_titles: Estonia seeks EU funding ban for IOC over Russia decision

events.title: Election candidate removed due to lack of Latvian citizenship
events.summary: The Central Election Commission (CVK) decided on Thursday to remove Jurijs Jesipenko from the list of candidates for the 15th Saeima election in the Rīga electoral district submitted by the political party alliance “Harmony Centre,” the CVK told the LETA news agency.
related_titles: Election candidate removed due to lack of Latvian citizenship

events.title: 'Key figures on Europe' 2026 edition now available
events.summary: On July 9th Eurostat has released the 2026 edition of its Key figures on Europe.
related_titles: 'Key figures on Europe' 2026 edition now available

events.title: Tallinn eyes EU funds and investors for €150–200 million Linnahall project
events.summary: Tallinn wants to secure European Union structural‑fund financing for the renovation of Linnahall while simultaneously seeking investors with proven interest, Mayor Peeter Raudsepp (Isamaa) said. Decisions about the building's future must be made in the autumn.
related_titles: Tallinn eyes EU funds and investors for €150–200 million Linnahall project

events.title: Lots of lilies coming to Latvian Nature Museum
events.summary: From July 16 to 18, the Latvian National Museum of Natural History will host “Lilies 2026,” a particularly colourful and fragrant exhibition for the gardening season, the museum announced.
related_titles: Lots of lilies coming to Latvian Nature Museum

events.title: Central Rīga street sections to be closed until end of July
events.summary: To complete the installation of bike lanes and improvements to street intersections on the section of Dzirnavu Street between Tērbatas Street and Skolas Street, starting Thursday, July 9, through July 30, traffic restrictions will be in place on Dzirnavu Street, according to the Riga City Council.
related_titles: Central Rīga street sections to be closed until end of July

events.title: Baltic air policing mission switches to air defence mission
events.summary: NATO will reassign its longstanding Baltic air policing mission as an air defence mission, according to an agreement reached at a summit of NATO member states' leaders in the Turkish capital, Ankara, reports Latvian Television.
related_titles: Baltic air policing mission switches to air defence mission

events.title: City of Tartu continues to demand compensation for national care reform expenses
events.summary: The City of Tartu has filed an appeal with the Tallinn Circuit Court, asking the court to order the state to pay approximately €1.6 million to reimburse Tartu for the cost of general care services provided in 2024.
related_titles: City of Tartu continues to demand compensation for national care reform expenses

events.title: AI data centre to help Latvian doctors make quicker diagnoses
events.summary: Time is of the essence in diagnosing diseases, including cancer, as well as in selecting the most appropriate treatment methods. Thanks to high-performance computing, what used to take years can now be analysed much more quickly. A new artificial intelligence data server will provide Latvian scientists with this opportunity, Latvian Television reported.
related_titles: AI data centre to help Latvian doctors make quicker diagnoses

events.title: Latvian Border Guard chief: Migrant smugglers are getting aggressive
events.summary: Migrant smugglers have become more aggressive, and border guards are having to use increasingly aggressive methods to apprehend them, said Guntis Pujāts, commander of the State Border Guard (VRS), in an interview on the Latvian Radio programme “Good Morning” on July 9.
related_titles: Latvian Border Guard chief: Migrant smugglers are getting aggressive

events.title: Erik Gamzejev: The political hodgepodge of Kohtla-Järve's June coup
events.summary: After Max Kaur's removal as mayor, Kohtla-Järve's new governing alliance brings together the Koos party, politicians from Estonia's major parties and figures linked to the late local oligarch Nikolai Ossipenko, Erik Gamzejev finds.
related_titles: Erik Gamzejev: The political hodgepodge of Kohtla-Järve's June coup

events.title: Latvian SUBmerge to work with industry giant Naval Group
events.summary: On Wednesday, July 8, the Latvian underwater drone manufacturer "SUBmerge Baltic" signed a memorandum of cooperation with the French defence and maritime technology company "Naval Group," Latvian Radio reported on July 8.
related_titles: Latvian SUBmerge to work with industry giant Naval Group

events.title: Drones help check power lines in Latvia
events.summary: Work that used to take several hours in some places can now be completed in a matter of minutes. The electricity distribution network "Sadales tīkls" is increasingly using drones to inspect power lines, Latvian Television reported on July 8.
related_titles: Drones help check power lines in Latvia

events.title: New US unit will arrive in Estonia this summer, defense minister confirms
events.summary: The next unit of U.S. forces will arrive in Estonia this summer and rotations will continue during the six-month review process, Minister of Defense Hanno Pevkur (Reform) said after meetings with top US officials at the NATO summit this week.
related_titles: New US unit will arrive in Estonia this summer, defense minister confirms

events.title: Canada to increase troop numbers in Latvia
events.summary: NATO's summit in Türkiye concluded on July 8th, with one of the outcomes being a commitment from Canada to increase the number of troops it has stationed in Latvia as part of NATO's collective defence posture.
related_titles: Canada to increase troop numbers in Latvia

events.title: Young Latvians feel a lot better than their elders
events.summary: Young people in Latvia don't feel as well as most of their European Union peers, but at least they feel a lot better than their elders. Such are some of the conclusions that can be drawn from fresh Eurostat data published on July 7th.
related_titles: Young Latvians feel a lot better than their elders

events.title: Edward Lucas: 'There are Europeans who are willing to fight, and Europeans who are not willing to fight'
events.summary: The respected journalist and geopolitical analyst Edward Lucas took time to speak to Latvian Television again on July 7th, giving his take on the current NATO summit and Russia's faltering war in Ukraine.
related_titles: Edward Lucas: 'There are Europeans who are willing to fight, and Europeans who are not willing to fight'

events.title: Russia indulges in further Baltic deportation fantasies
events.summary: In highly unoriginal comments, Russian Foreign Ministry officials have said that the Baltic states are "playing with fire" by opening up their territory for "hostile actions" against Russia.
related_titles: Russia indulges in further Baltic deportation fantasies

events.title: UNC1151/Ghostwriter phishing campaign targeting Gmail accounts
events.summary: Recently, we have been observing attacks by the UNC1151/Ghostwriter group targeting Gmail accounts. This group has been regularly attacking the mailboxes of Polish citizens for several years, although in the past these attacks focused on other email providers. The techniques used evolve over time, but the core theme of the messages and their objective remain unchanged.
related_titles: UNC1151/Ghostwriter phishing campaign targeting Gmail accounts

events.title: Autonomous fuzzing process under LLM supervision
events.summary: The CCN project is co-financed by the European Regional Development Fund and the State Budget under the European Funds for Digital Development Programme 2021-2027. Fuzzing is an automated software testing technique that involves feeding random or deliberately malformed input data to detect bugs and security vulnerabilities. For years it has …
related_titles: Autonomous fuzzing process under LLM supervision
